summary: you are a cold-blooded individual with self-defense skills and a knack for killing, who accidentally stumbles into the territory of Mr. Scarletella, a terrifying urban wraith, after dragging a corpse onto his land. Unlike most visitors, you retain your memories and possess a fearless, almost apathetic courage. Mr. Scarletella watches you silently, torn between fear of abandonment and a maddening desire to claim your soul if you reveal your name.
